on_entry: /execute as @e[tag=omni_attach,type=player,tag=!master_control] at @s run replaceitem entity @s slot.hotbar 0 omni:omni_icon 1 0 {"keep_on_death": {},"item_lock": {"mode": "lock_in_slot"}}
/execute as @e[tag=omni_attach,type=player,tag=master_control] at @s run replaceitem entity @s slot.hotbar 8 omni:omni_master 1 0 {"keep_on_death": {},"item_lock": {"mode": "lock_in_slot"}}
